query: heavy film grain noise analog photograph high ISO texture
message: sub:film_artifacts/grain — anti_aesthetic — heavy grain, high-ISO noise, push-processed analog texture

response.objective_caption: A monochrome close-up of a smooth, dark, rounded object with two small reflective highlights catching light from above, resting on a lighter surface against a textured gradient background that shifts from bright white at the top to deep black at the bottom.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred and abstract monochrome image with dense film grain throughout, showing an indistinct dark rounded object with specular highlights dissolving into a textured gradient from blown-out white to crushed black, creating an unsettling, dreamlike atmosphere where the subject remains unrecognizable.
